chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1114 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.7551/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.4537/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 12.11.2025 Mr. Asif Ali Jatoi, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Assistant Advocate General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner wishes to withdraw the present Constitution Petition. Upon consideration the request for withdrawal, and there being no objection from the learned counsel representing the respondents, the instant Constitution Petition stands disposed of as withdrawn, along with all pending/listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
